title: Fence Depot Installation Tasks Schema
description: Labour tasks and time estimates for each fence type

fence_type.description: Type of fence this task applies to

task_name.description: Short name of the installation task

task_description.description: Detailed description of what the task involves

unit.description: The unit this time estimate is per

labour_hours_per_unit.description: Number of man-hours required per unit

crew_size.description: Number of workers needed for this task

equipment_needed.description: Tools and equipment required for this task

notes.description: Additional notes, tips or safety information
